methodology: We purchase every product at retail; no manufacturer samples or pay-to-play placements.
Material callouts list silicone grade, plasticizers, and glycerin/paraben flags when labels allow.
Noise is measured at 1 meter with a phone SPL app on consistent charge level.
Subscription value uses 90-day reorder logs before we recommend or warn against auto-ship.
Affiliate links are disclosed at top of money pages; we do not link to brands that sponsor coverage.
Reader corrections are answered within 72 hours with dated addenda.

newsletter.title: The PleasureWatch weekly
newsletter.subtitle: Practical picks and straight answers from PleasureWatch, once a week. No spam.

defaultMetaDescription: Hands-on notes on couples wellness gear, body-safe materials, noise levels, and whether subscription pricing beats buying once — with affiliate links only on picks we would buy ourselves.

homepage.h1: Marketing promises more than the box delivers. We measure what actually lasts.

about.headline: Why PleasureWatch exists
about.body: We started PleasureWatch after one too many "premium" kits with vague materials lists and auto-ship cadences that did not match real use. We publish plain-language tests, price-per-month math, and material callouts so adults can choose gear without embarrassment-driven upsells.
